name: Laundry Room Dilemma
short_description: You find yourself amnesiac and trapped in a laundry room. You can earn food by working. Who built this place? How do you escape?
detailed_description:
Introduction


You've been trapped in this laundry room for a long time, and many inexplicable things have happened. Food magically appears the next day, you keep having the same nightmare, and screams echo in the hallways...

Content


  • Exploration: Experience the entire story from a first-person perspective.
  • Linear: A linear plot that focuses on storytelling.
  • Fear: Scary scenes, including jump-scares.
  • Save: The game will auto-save by chapters.

The game allows you to enable "Stream Mode" in the options. When enabled, content unsuitable for streaming will be automatically filtered.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
